metadata.title: Refund Policy
metadata.description: Net eSIM refund policy - eligibility criteria and how to request a refund for your eSIM purchase.
metadata.keywords: refund policy, esim refund, cancellation, net esim refund

hero.heading: Fair & Transparent
hero.description: This Refund Policy applies to purchases made through the Net Sim platform operated by NET NOVA GROUP LTD.

intro: This Refund Policy applies to purchases made through the Net Sim platform operated by NET NOVA GROUP LTD.

eligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
eligibility.body: Refunds may be issued if a purchased eSIM data package has not been activated or delivered successfully.

non-refundable.title: Non-Refundable Situations
non-refundable.body: Once an eSIM data plan has been activated or used, refunds may not be possible due to the nature of digital connectivity services.

requests.title: Refund Requests
requests.body: Customers may contact our support team to request assistance or submit refund requests.

contact.heading: Contact Support
contact.text: For any refund-related inquiries or to submit a refund request, please contact:
